chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD CP. No. S- 44 of 2018 DATED ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 25.01.2018 For orders on office objection For katcha peshi None present for petitioner Mr. Wali Muhammad Jamari, Asstt: A.G. Learned Asstt. A.G. has filed comments of behalf of official respondents which are taken on record. The petitioner and his counsel are not present today; however, I have noted from the prayer clause of the petition whereby the petitioner has prayed that the official respondents may be directed not to harass the petitioner and shall provide legal protection. Learned A.A.G. is present and states that the official respondents shall act strictly in accordance with law and shall provide the same protection to the petitioners as is available to other citizen of country. In view of statement of learned A.A.G. the present petition is disposed of. JUDGE karar_hussain /PS*
